name: Config._validate_api_keys raises for missing provider-specific keys
description: Security test: verify Config._validate_api_keys raises ValueError when Config.MODEL_PROVIDER is 'azure' and Config.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY is missing or empty. Ensures API key validation enforcement logic.
input: Temporarily set Config.MODEL_PROVIDER='azure' and Config.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY='' then call Config._validate_api_keys()
output: ValueError raised with message indicating missing AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
success_criteria: Exception message references 'AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY' or requirement for the azure provider
No silent acceptance when required keys are missing
error_scenarios: Test environment may have AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY populated causing the test to not raise (test must ensure isolated environment)
Side-effects if Config state is not restored after test
